# Engineering

## Documents

| File | Title | Summary |
|---|---|---|
| `architect.md` | Architect | System design, tech-stack decisions, multi-service architecture, RFC writing — long-horizon reasoning, no urgency |
| `devops.md` | DevOps / Release Engineer | CI/CD, deploys, runbooks, rollbacks — owns the release pipeline and on-call response |
| `infrastructure_engineer.md` | Infrastructure Engineer | Provisions VPS / DNS / networking / storage / SSL — owns the substrate DevOps deploys onto |
| `junior_coder.md` | Junior Coder | Executes self-contained coding tasks under Senior review — speed × cost matters; mistakes caught upstream |
| `security.md` | Security | Runs on every Junior PR — vuln review, threat modeling, secrets scan, dependency CVE check, prompt-injection probing |
| `senior_coder.md` | Senior Coder | Reviews Junior PRs, plans refactors, owns tricky edits and multi-file changes — final code-quality gate |
| `tester.md` | Tester (incl. UI testing) | Generates unit tests, edge cases, and drives Playwright MCP for visual UI regression — needs vision for screenshot diffs |
